title: spawn plugin
description:
/spawn plugin | customizable cooldown | easy setup | free
Avoid the hassle with an easy to setup /spawn plugin with customizable cooldowns using commands
body:
This plugin is an easy to setup /spawn plugin so you can avoid the hassle of looking through so many and finding the right one 

**DOCUMENTATION FOR THIS PROJECT IS HERE **


**all messages are editable in the config.yml of the plugin**
in the config you may choose if you want only chat messages only actionbar messages or a mix between the 2 by enabling or disabling them (very simple configuration)

/spawn set 
This sets the spawn of wherever you want in your mc world and any player can do /spawn and teleport there
Permissions: spawn.set

/spawn cooldown <seconds>
this sets the amount of seconds where the player can NOT move before they actually teleport to spawn 
Permissions: spawn.cooldown.set

/spawn 
teleports to the spawn set by operators when they do /spawn set 
Permissions: Default

/spawn reload
Reloads the plugin configuration and applies changes
